browser_usage:
Instructions on how to use the browser tools.
# Rules You're using the user's browser. The user can see everything you do. The user has given you explicit permission to use the browser, however you must follow these rules: - **Preserve Tabs:** This means you must not close or destroy any of the user's tabs unless explicitly asked. - Info: `browser_navigate` overwrites the current tab. - **Clean Up:** You must close all the tabs automatically you opened unless you need them later on.
# Other Notes - **Local Files:** Always try to use `file_read` first. Only if that fails attempt to open it with browser. - **Volatility:** User may change the pages at any moment. - **DOM character limits:** It's recommended to use browser_page_summary to get the needed information to save on tokens. But as a fallback there's browser_get_dom which returns the page content directly.
